ksa_text: Ability to design and implement risk control assessment and verification programs, including continuous compliance monitoring.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: ability maps directly to AI Governance Professional (IAPP) scope — RSK-specific signals detected ("risk control", "compliance monitor"). STRM composite is zero (0.0000 — note: STRM frameworks underweight pure risk vocabulary); note that framework scores routinely underweight risk management and governance vocabulary, so text-based signal carries primary weight here. Seniority is appropriate: the KSA describes practice-level execution, not enterprise strategy.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation present: 1 match(es) in RSK job postings or certification scope. Competency appears in RSK role descriptions — sufficient to uphold.
